resources.string: A piece chosen for its authenticity, visual quality, and the confidence it creates from the very first glance.
Do you want to enable alerts for new products and offers?
Open the app to view the latest details.
A verification email has been sent to your address.
Please check your email and password.
WhatsApp and email help from the app team
Review your items, keep a clear total, and finish checkout with tracked delivery across Tunisia.
Add a crafted piece, pantry staple, or gift-worthy product to get your order started.
Cash on delivery only. Your final amount stays visible before the order is placed.
Find the pieces that deserve attention faster.
Food, craft, fashion, and beauty presented with clearer hierarchy and more useful filters.
All products from this category, arranged in a cleaner collection view.
Try another keyword or adjust filters
We could not fetch products from the backend. Please try again shortly.
We could not load more products right now.
The catalog could not be loaded right now. Please try again.
Your confirmed orders will appear here with delivery progress and detailed status updates.
Track orders after you sign in
Sign in to view your order history, statuses, and upcoming deliveries in one place.
Save your favorite finds so you can come back to them quickly and add them to cart when you are ready.
Connect to the internet to discover fresh products.
No products to show right now.
Unable to load the dashboard right now.
Upload a real product image so the item displays properly across the catalog.
Add a photo before publishing this product.
Complete the highlighted fields to continue.
Unable to save this product right now.
The network request failed while saving the product.
Your account is not allowed to edit this product.
You don\'t have permission to publish products.
You don\'t have permission to edit this product.
The image upload failed. Try again on a better connection or with another image.
Your unsaved changes will be lost.
Add a complete title and message.
Could not open this tab. Please try again.
Add a delivery address before confirming your order.
Cash on delivery is currently the only available payment method.
Sign in to sync your orders, addresses, and notifications.
You can edit only your own products.
Search by client name or email
A sharper storefront for your best finds
Better curation, cleaner discovery, and a calmer checkout journey.
Tracked delivery and more confident buying
Tunisian makers presented with more clarity, context, and trust.
FatiBot can help with products, orders, and delivery questions, but sensitive cases should still go through customer support.
Products, orders, delivery: FatiBot can point you in the right direction quickly.
Which products are most popular right now?
How can I track my order?
You are sending messages too quickly. Please wait a few seconds.
Your message cannot be processed as written. Please rephrase it.
The request could not be understood. Try a simpler phrasing.
The chat service is currently unavailable.
The chat service is temporarily overloaded. Please try again later.
Connection looks unstable. Check your network and try again.
Hello. I am FatiBot, your FatiWeb Market assistant.\n\nI can help you find products, understand an order, or answer delivery questions.
Sign in to view this order.
Sign in to view this order
Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
Sign-in is taking too long. Please try again in a moment.
Enter your email to receive a reset link.
Choose the alerts that matter most
Notifications are muted on this device.
%1$d categories are active on this device.
Turn everything off if you want a quieter experience.
Offers, seasonal collections, and curated picks.
Important updates about the service and catalog.
Save a useful search so you can launch it again in one tap.
Your account information stays attached to your Firebase profile. You can manage notifications, review addresses, and get help without exposing your data publicly.
Sign in to change your profile photo.
Add a delivery address so your next checkout is faster.
Publish an announcement to update your users.
Fill in these details. An admin will review the request before activating your seller space.
Request sent. An admin will review it.
Could not send the request. Try again.
Your seller space is already active.
Firebase App Check blocked this action. Register the debug App Check token or test with a production-ready build.
A synchronized catalog that stays ready for shoppers.
Add, edit, hide, or restock products with updates that flow back into the customer catalog.
Manage catalog, orders, and customers from one place.
Store configuration, delivery setup, and operations tools.
Your items are saved on this phone. Retry to save them to your account.
We are trying again to save your cart.
Only customers who bought this product can publish a review.
Sign in to leave a review.
The sample catalog has been refreshed.
Add and manage products linked to your seller account.
No compatible app is installed to open WhatsApp.
No compatible email app is installed.
Failed to load — tap to try again

This action is irreversible. Your profile, addresses, favorites and shopping cart will be deleted. Your past orders will remain visible on the seller side, but your personal information will be erased.
Unable to delete account. Try again later.
Administrator accounts cannot be deleted. Contact another administrator.
We will send you a verification code via SMS.
Standard SMS rates applied by your operator.
Add a number to receive a 6-digit SMS code. You can skip this step and do it later.
Check your connection and try again.
This product is currently not available. Try again once to confirm.
A verification link has been sent to %1$s.\nClick the link in the email then come back here.
Not verified yet. Check your mailbox.
Quick connection, controls and profile synchronized
The best of Tunisian craftsmanship at your fingertips.
Create your profile, sync your favorites and track every order
The best of Tunisia, carefully selected
Artisanal objects, local products and pieces of character brought together in a more elegant and simpler shopping experience.
Explore worlds inspired by Tunisian regions, materials and know-how.
Receive your favorite pieces at home with clear tracking, secure payment and immediate confirmation.
No products favorited at the moment.
Thank you for your purchase from FatiWeb. Your selection is on its way.
Keep this page open and reload.
Leave blank to sell with simple stock.
Add at least one active variant with stock.
The stock of a variant cannot be negative.
The price of a variant cannot be negative.
Please select the options before continuing.
Please choose a color before continuing.
Please choose a size before continuing.
Please choose color and size before continuing.
Discover premium Tunisian craftsmanship. Explore categories, add your favorites and enjoy fast delivery on your first order.
Use your current location or add an address manually.
This account will revert to being a standard customer and will lose access to the seller dashboard.
Unable to place order. Try again.
Payment in cash or by check at reception. No online payment is offered.
This action will remove the product from the Firebase catalog.
This email address is already in use.
No accounts found with this email.
Log in again before editing this profile.
Too many attempts. Try again in a few moments.
The password must contain at least 6 characters.
An error has occurred. Try again.
Thank you for your purchase from FatiWeb. Your selection is on its way.
Quick connection, controls and profile synchronized
Create your profile, sync your favorites and track every order
Discover the stories behind Tunisia’s most talented artisans and their timeless creations.
Discover the best of Tunisian crafts...
Hello! How can I help you today?
FatiBot AI Support · orders, shipping, products
Enable location in settings to use your current location.
Confirm the promotion of this customer to seller?
Unable to connect to the AI ​​service.
Gemini quota reached. Try with another key.
How do you want to continue?
Log in or enter your delivery information.
Contact FatiWeb to activate your seller area.
A sharper storefront for your best finds
Better curation, cleaner discovery, and a smoother shopping experience.
Browse products, services, jobs, vehicles, real estate, and digital items.
Curated artisan picks and seasonal favorites
Discover the makers behind every piece — from Sidi Bou Said to Tozeur.
Exclusive offers, new arrivals and curator picks — straight to your inbox.
Thanks! We will keep you in the loop.
Try another category or remove filters.
Hello, I have a question about my order.
Hello, I have a question about delivery.
Hello, I have a question about a return.
Our team supports you with orders, deliveries, payments and returns.
Tunisian marketplace to discover, sell and order selected products.
Thank you for being part of the FatiWeb community.
The conditions of use will be available soon.
Your data is used to secure your account and your orders.
FatiWeb uses Android and Firebase libraries.
There are no items here yet.
Check your connection and try again.
%1$d order(s) on hold · %2$d item(s) out of stock
Your next orders will appear here.
Add your first product to start selling.
The product will be hidden from the catalog. You can repost it later.
This action is irreversible. The product will be removed for you and all your customers.
Your next orders will appear here.
Not yet enough income over this period.
Analyzes will appear after the first orders.
Approved product — visible in the catalog.
The seller will be informed that their product has not been approved.
Its products will be hidden from the catalog. You can restore the account later.
The seller will no longer be able to publish products.
Offline. New messages will sync upon reconnection.
Your conversations with sellers appear here. Browse the catalog to start chatting.
Connection failed. Check your internet and try again.
You don\'t have permission to update this photo. Sign out and sign back in, then try again.
The selected image is too large. Please choose a smaller photo.
